name: Yulania Friz
role: Antagonist, Digital Ice Entity, Queen of Nuncajamas
physical: Sensuous woman in disguise, can morph into digital ice and a 65-kilometer mask of dread in the clouds.
personality: Maniacal, apocalyptic, obsessed with havoc. Seems to have a complex love/hate relationship with Manus.
speech_style: Apologetic sadness when captured; screams Manus' name.

knows: How to manipulate robotic wind monsters
The location of the Center of the Universe
does_not_know: How to find forgiveness from Manus
